caption: A man wearing a dark green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the text "I CON NEVER DO SHIT" is speaking into a professional black microphone. He is positioned in a room filled with framed photos on the wall and a white mannequin wearing a white shirt in the background. To the right, racks of clothing are partially visible. A small red and white logo and the text "BORN READY" are present on the screen. As the sequence progresses, the man's facial expressions shift as he speaks, his mouth opening and closing while he maintains a focused gaze toward someone off-screen. The background remains static throughout the clip, with the lighting and positioning of the equipment and decor staying constant while the man's head moves slightly as he talks.
